ddls:
CREATE TABLE "properties" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property */,
  "house_age" REAL /* Age of the house in years */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the property */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the property */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the property */,
  "property_type" TEXT /* Type of property (e.g., apartment, house, commercial) */,
  "property_size" REAL /* Size of the property in square meters or square feet */,
  "number_of_rooms" INTEGER /* Number of rooms in the property */,
  "number_of_bathrooms" INTEGER /* Number of bathrooms in the property */,
  "year_built" INTEGER /* Year the property was built */,
  "last_renovated" INTEGER /* Year the property was last renovated */,
  "property_condition" TEXT /* Condition of the property (e.g., excellent, good, fair) */,
  "property_value" REAL /* Current estimated value of the property */,
  "zoning" TEXT /* Zoning classification of the property */,
  "property_image_url" TEXT /* URL to an image of the property */,
  "property_description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the property */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "transactions" (
  "transaction_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each transaction */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" REAL /* Date of the transaction */,
  "house_price_of_unit_area" REAL /* House price of unit area at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., sale, lease, rental) */,
  "buyer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the buyer */,
  "seller_id" INTEGER /* ID of the seller */,
  "transaction_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the transaction */,
  "property_value_at_transaction" REAL /* Value of the property at the time of the transaction */,
  "transaction_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("transaction_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_transactions_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "mrt_stations" (
  "mrt_station_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each MRT station */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the MRT station */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the MRT station */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the MRT station */,
  "line_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MRT line */,
  "line_name" TEXT /* Name of the MRT line */,
  "station_description" TEXT /* Description of the station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("mrt_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "convenience_stores" (
  "convenience_store_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each convenience store */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the convenience store */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude coordinate of the convenience store */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude coordinate of the convenience store */,
  "store_type" TEXT /* Type of store (e.g., 24/7, mini-market) */,
  "store_description" TEXT /* Description of the store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("convenience_store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_mrt_distances" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "mrt_station_id" INTEGER /* ID of the MRT station */,
  "distance" REAL /* Distance between the property and the MRT station */,
  "nearest_mrt_station" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest MRT station */,
  "distance_to_nearest_mrt_station" REAL /* Distance to the nearest MRT station */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "mrt_station_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_convenience_store_counts" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "convenience_store_id" INTEGER /* ID of the convenience store */,
  "count" INTEGER /* Count of convenience stores near the property */,
  "nearest_convenience_store" INTEGER /* ID of the nearest convenience store */,
  "distance_to_nearest_convenience_store" REAL /* Distance to the nearest convenience store */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "convenience_store_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rental_agreements" (
  "rental_agreement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rental agreement */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the rental agreement */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the rental agreement */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the rental agreement */,
  "rent" REAL /* Monthly rent amount */,
  "tenant_id" INTEGER /* ID of the tenant */,
  "rental_period" TEXT /* Duration of the rental agreement in months or years */,
  "deposit_amount" REAL /* Amount of the security deposit */,
  "agreement_status" TEXT /* Status of the rental agreement (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "agreement_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the rental agreement */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rental_agreement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rental_agreements_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "maintenance_records" (
  "maintenance_record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each maintenance record */,
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property involved in the maintenance record */,
  "maintenance_date" TEXT /* Date of the maintenance */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the maintenance work */,
  "maintenance_type" TEXT /* Type of maintenance (e.g., routine, emergency) */,
  "maintenance_cost" REAL /* Cost of the maintenance work */,
  "maintenance_status" TEXT /* Status of the maintenance (e.g., scheduled, completed) */,
  "technician_id" INTEGER /* ID of the technician who performed the maintenance */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("maintenance_record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_maintenance_records_property_id FOREIGN KEY ("property_id") REFERENCES properties ("property_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_managers" (
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each property manager */,
  "name" TEXT /* Name of the property manager */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the property manager */,
  "phone" TEXT /* Phone number of the property manager */,
  "manager_level" TEXT /* Level of the property manager (e.g., junior, senior) */,
  "manager_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the property manager */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "property_manager_assignments" (
  "property_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property */,
  "property_manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the property manager */,
  "assignment_date" TEXT /* Date of the assignment */,
  "assignment_status" TEXT /* Status of the assignment (e.g., active, terminated) */,
  "assignment_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the assignment */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("property_id", "property_manager_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., admin, user) */,
  "full_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "user_status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "user_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_log_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access log */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date of the access */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., login, logout) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user at the time of access */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user at the time of access */,
  "access_notes" TEXT /* Additional notes about the access */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_log_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
